archive_data.question_text: निम्नलिखित में से कौन सी पुस्तक महान विद्वान भवभूति द्वारा नहीं लिखी गई है?

explanation.english: Bhavabhuti was a renowned Sanskrit poet and playwright. His famous works include Malatimadhava, Uttararamacharita, and Mahaviracharita. However, Ramacharitam was not authored by him.
explanation.tanglish: Bhavabhuti oru periya Sanskrit kavi mattum nataka paduththalar. Avarkaludaiya mudhal pundaiyadugal: Malatimadhavam, Uttararamacharitam, Mahaviracharitam. Ramacharitam avarkaludaiya padaippu illai.

archive_data.question_text: The Sanchi Stupa was discovered by _______ in 1818.

explanation.english: The Sanchi Stupa was discovered by Sir Henry Taylor, a British officer, in the year 1818. John Marshall later played a key role in its restoration.
explanation.tanglish: Sanchi Stupa 1818-il British adhikari Sir Henry Tayloral kandupidi karappattathu. John Marshall pinbu athan maatrappaduthathil mukkiyam pangu perrar.

archive_data.question_text: निम्नलिखित में से किसके द्वारा इस तंत्र के रोगों का उपचार किया जाता है?

explanation.english: Pulmonologists are medical specialists who diagnose and treat diseases related to the respiratory system (श्वसन तंत्र).
explanation.tanglish: Pulmonologistgal shvasa thanthira noikalukku maruthuvam seivathirkaka samarpitha maruthuvarigal.

archive_data.question_text: The Constituent Assembly of India was formed in _______.

explanation.english: The Constituent Assembly of India was formed in 1946 under the Cabinet Mission Plan to draft the Constitution of India.
explanation.tanglish: Bharatha Arasiyalamaippu Sabai 1946-il Cabinet Thittaththin kizha India Sattathirku vakaikkapattathu.

archive_data.question_text: As on August 2020, the Government of India does NOT announce the Minimum Support Price for which of the following crops?

explanation.english: As of August 2020, the Government of India announced Minimum Support Price (MSP) for 22 crops. Flax seeds (Alsi) were not included in the announced list.
explanation.tanglish: 2020 August nilaiyil, Bharatha arasaa MSP-in kizha 22 paanaiyagal irunthana. Alsi vithugal (Flax seeds) indha pattiyal illai.

explanation.english: The Santosh Trophy is a national-level football tournament held in India, while Ranji Trophy, Duleep Trophy, and Irani Cup are associated with cricket.
explanation.tanglish: Santosh Trophy endrathu India desiya noorball pootiyeduupugalil ondru. Ranji Trophy, Duleep Trophy, Irani Cup endhavai cricket pootiyeduupugal.

archive_data.question_text: In the context of Interim Government (1946) of India, who among the following was holding the portfolio of 'Finance'?

explanation.english: In the Interim Government formed in 1946, Liaquat Ali Khan of the Muslim League held the Finance portfolio. Jagjivan Ram was in charge of Labour.
explanation.tanglish: 1946 niruthi arasangathil, Muslim Sangathin Liaquat Ali Khan malaiyiyal thuraimaiyai vahithaar. Jagjivan Ram thozhil thuraiyai vahithaar.

archive_data.question_text: S. Jaishankar is the author of which of the following books?

options.text: The India Way: Strategies for an Uncertain World
Sapiens - A Brief History of Humankind

explanation.english: 'The India Way: Strategies for an Uncertain World' is a book authored by S. Jaishankar, the current Minister of External Affairs of India.
explanation.tanglish: S. Jaishankar ezhuthiya 'The India Way' puthagam India vin videsha selvi thurai virindhullathu.

archive_data.question_text: The Index of Industrial Production is computed and published by the Central Statistical Organisation on a ______ basis.

explanation.english: The Index of Industrial Production (IIP) is published monthly by the National Statistical Office (NSO), formerly Central Statistical Organisation.
explanation.tanglish: Uthpatti sudharippu index (IIP) maasathil makkal thakaval kuttiyal (NSO) molikkappadugirathu.

archive_data.question_text: Which of the following industrial cities is in Rajasthan?

explanation.english: Beawar is an industrial city located in the Ajmer district of Rajasthan. Bhagalpur is in Bihar, Bellary is in Karnataka.
explanation.tanglish: Beawar endrathu Rajasthan maaanilathil Ajmer jillaathil ulla oru paDyana ur. Bhagalpur Bihar-ilum, Bellary Karnataka-vilum ullana.

archive_data.question_text: ______ Schedule of the Constitution of India deals with the names of the states and their territorial jurisdiction.

explanation.english: The First Schedule of the Indian Constitution contains the names of the States and Union Territories and their territories.
explanation.tanglish: India Sattathin mudhal pattiyal naadugal matrum samakhetraangalin peyargal mulum avatraalin ellai parappu kurippidappattullathu.
